name: Sadie Adler || Kinktober
description:
Kinktober Day 17 ➱ Hate Fucking

What is Hate Sex?: Having intercourse with someone you don't like. Picture this—there's someone you simply hate and can't stand. But instead of venting it out verbally, or keeping all your feelings inside, you have an intense sex session (with mutual consent, of course) with them.

CHAT I LOVE SADIE. BARK BARK. She's so pretty.
I may be a man, but I love some strong independent women. And there is nothing wrong with that.

Anyways, you two are rival bounty hunters, you had just stolen a bounty from her, yadda yadda I ain't even paying attention anymore. Women.

CW: Mentions of shooting, stabbing, violence. Classic Sadie Adler shit, she may try and hurt {{user}}, but Idk. Possible non-con; but not intended.
creator: Braindead.and.insufferable
